item.title: It's an intense process!
item.description: Sadly I don't know the sauce. EDIT: Thanks for the upvotes, Imgurians! Remember to properly exercise and be awesome to each other! I do some reviews (As a hobby, not paid!) at https://hypeimmune.wordpress.com/ feel free to check them!
item.dc:creator: Skullwriter

Nah.
I love Polly Pockets. All my compact ones were stolen years ago and I wish I still had them. I want them back so badly.
The pickle.

So friggin cute. I want to kiss him.

I just thought of a great Halloween costume for my boyfriend and I- I can be Pippi (I’m a ginger) and he can be the cow (he loves cows) wait I think it was a horse actually

I looooove talking to people irl.
My boyfriend cried when he died
Ruthie Quickturkey… I don’t think this works
Or women who suck balls at writing characters… BELLA!!!

item.title: Cool poster restoration process
item.description:
From IG: Fourth Cone Restoration Art Restoration Service Art studio dedicated to the restoration and conservation of vintage posters, prints, fine art, and collectibles since 2014 in Los Angeles, CA. Here’s their Linktree for anybody interested: http://linktr.ee/fourthconerestoration
I follow these ladies on IG and enjoy their videos a lot.
item.dc:creator: CapttainKillJoy

item.title: Webb Finds First Brown Dwarf Beyond The Milky Way
item.description: Webb Finds First Brown Dwarf Beyond The Milky Way Oktay Yürük, Oktay74tn Observations of the young star cluster NGC 602 with the James Webb Space Telescope have led to the discovery of 64 brown dwarf candidates. This is the first extra-galactic population of brown dwarfs. Brown dwarfs are objects with a mass of about 13 to 80 Jupiter masses. NGC 602 is located in the outer region of the Small Magellanic Cloud, 200,000 light-years from Earth. The young brown dwarfs are colocated with pre-main-sequence stars. There are an estimated 25 to 100 billion brown dwarfs in the Milky Way. Wikipedia articles https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/NGC_602 https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Brown_dwarf https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Luhman_16 https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Metallicity https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Initial_mass_function https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Small_Magellanic_Cloud https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Large_Magellanic_Cloud https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Magellanic_Stream Discovering Subsolar Metallicity Brown Dwarf Candidates in the Small Magellanic Cloud Peter Zeidler, Elena Sabbi, Antonella Nota, Elena Manjavacas, Olivia C. Jones, and Camilla Pacifici https://iopscience.iop.org/article/10.3847/1538-4357/ad779e
item.dc:creator: Oktay74tn

item.title: My cousin is missing, please help us find him!
item.description: Woke up to this news today, and I'd love the help of Imgur to find him. He's a good kid, and I'd love to see him back home safe and sound where he belongs.
